Name: Jefferson Health Plans

Name: Sancor Seguros Brasil

A companhia tem uma filosofia cooperativista como norteadora de suas estratégias e práticas. Está no país com o propósito de proteger conquistas e sonhos, promovendo progresso e bem estar aos seus clientes e parceiros.

Name: NSIA VIE ASSURANCES SN

Só vem, porque a Darwin TÁ ON!

Name: AXA Luxembourg & AXA Wealth Europe
Description: Notre raison d’être est d’agir pour le progrès humain en protégeant ce qui compte.

Name: IZA Seguradora S.A.

Eleita a Principal Empresa de Inovação, neste segmento do Mercado de Seguros, é feita para empresas e prestadores de serviço de TODO o país - independente da região e área de atuação -, e suas soluções atendem novos mercados e modelos de consumo que buscam proteções diferenciadas. 

Referência em atendimento nossos produtos e serviços facilitam a vida de quem não pode parar.

Name: Banner Life family of companies | life insurance
Description:
The Banner Life family of companies, established through its predecessor companies in 1949, consists of two insurance companies, Banner Life Insurance Company, which insures policyholders and annuitants in 49 states and DC, and Banner Life’s wholly-owned subsidiary, William Penn Life Insurance Company of New York, which insures policyholders and annuitants in New York. William Penn products are available exclusively in New York; Banner Life is not authorized as an insurer and does not do business in New York.

Banner Life is dedicated to continually enhancing its term life insurance and retirement products and experience for everyone. And with 99% of term life insurance claims paid to nearly 4,000 families, and retirement secured for over 35,000 annuitants in 2024, the Banner Life family of companies is here when people need us most. 

Banner Life family of companies is here for you, here for good and here for better.

Name: Summit
Description:
Summit provides independent insurance agents and their clients with market-leading workers’ comp insurance and elite customer service. We’re growing, currently serving more than 7,000 independent agents and 31,000 policyholders across 15 states in the South, Midwest, and Mid-Atlantic. 

Our strength comes from a single-minded focus on workers’ comp and a commitment to long-term customer relationships. Summit is who you turn to when you need a specialist who not only knows workers’ comp but also gets to know your business and your priorities. 

Our field team members are located in every state in which we operate. We’re not a faceless corporation with distant headquarters. We’re part of the fabric of local communities.

As the world becomes increasingly impersonal, Summit offers a customer experience based on relationships and personal service. You’ll always be able to speak to a real human being. You’ll always receive timely answers you can trust. 

Insurance agents, policyholders, and injured employees can count on three things from Summit: 

1) More Access. Our team members are not only masters in the field but they’re easy to reach and highly responsive when you need answers.

2) More Know-how. You’ll get better answers from real experts and industry veterans who know workers’ comp, your business, your customers, and your region.

3) More Commitment. You’ll have collaborators who go the extra mile to serve you and who are willing to solve problems that others usually can’t.

Summit manages affiliates, Bridgefield Casualty Insurance Company, Bridgefield Employers Insurance Company, and Bridgefield Indemnity Insurance Company, and nonaffiliates, BusinessFirst Insurance Company, RetailFirst Insurance Company, and Retailers Casualty Insurance Company. 

Summit is a member of Great American Insurance Group and a subsidiary of American Financial Group, Inc (AFG). AFG’s common stock is listed and traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol AFG.

Name: A Mundial Seguros, SA
Description:
A Mundial Seguros é uma empresa com 18 anos de actuação no mercado, destaca-se como uma referência no sector, especialmente no ramo vida, registrando o melhor desempenho anual em todo o País. 

Este resultado positivo representa um elemento crucial para impulsionar o negócio, aprimorar a qualidade dos serviços desde a concepção até a entrega final do produto, e capacitar o 
quadro de pessoal para tornar-se cada vez mais uma seguradora de excelência.

Com um compromisso voltado ao consumidor final, inovamos continuamente os nossos produtos, considerando o actual contexto do país e das organizações.

Name: SUNU Assurances RDC
Description:

Le Groupe SUNU est présent dans 17 pays d’Afrique Subsaharienne avec près d’une trentaine de sociétés.

Name: SanlamAllianz Madagascar
Description:
SanlamAllianz Madagascar Assurances est une filiale du groupe panafricain SanlamAllianz, présent dans 27 pays et valorisé à près de 2 milliards USD.
Issue de l’alliance stratégique entre Sanlam, premier groupe africain de services financiers non bancaires, et Allianz, leader mondial de l’assurance, cette union marque une nouvelle étape dans notre ambition : proposer des solutions d’assurance toujours plus performantes et adaptées aux besoins de nos clients.
Avec SanlamAllianz Madagascar Assurances, nous élargissons notre offre de produits, renforçons notre expertise en gestion des risques et améliorons la qualité de nos services. Cette nouvelle dynamique nous positionne pour relever les défis du marché tout en saisissant de nouvelles opportunités de croissance durable.

Name: AXA Côte d'Ivoire
Description:
AXA Côte d’Ivoire aide ses clients à vivre confiants jour après jour, en les protégeant, en protégeant leurs familles et leurs biens contre les risques.
Parce que chaque jour est différent, nous accompagnons nos clients à travers les petites et les grandes difficultés de la vie et leur donnons les moyens d’entreprendre et de préparer l’avenir en toute sérénité.

Name: CoverageX
Description:
CoverageX delivers high-quality vehicle service contracts and home warranty plans designed to protect what matters most. No dealer markups. Clear terms. Real support.

Headquartered in Clearwater, Florida, we serve drivers and homeowners nationwide through a 550-person team spanning policy sales, customer service, and claims. Our plans include 24/7 roadside assistance, rental car benefits, and flexible protection tiers tailored to real-world needs.

We’re not an insurance company, and we don’t act like one. We’re building a modern alternative: more transparent, more responsive, and more aligned with the people we serve.

Backed by a commitment to quality and innovation, CoverageX is raising the bar for service contract providers across both auto and home.

Our mission is simple: provide real protection, clear terms, and support you can count on.

Name: HOMEE, Inc.
Description:
HOMEE is the only AI-Driven Direct Repair Network for the Property and Casualty (P&C) insurance industry. Our cutting-edge AI technology connects insurers, policyholders, and our nationwide network of HOMEE Pros throughout the life cycle of a claim in a fraction of the time.
 
HOMEE, in combination with a highly curated network of service providers, is utilized by leading firms in the insurance sector to dramatically improve the claims experience for policyholders. HOMEE is backed by more than $75 million in investment from leading insurance companies such as W.R. Berkley, Liberty Mutual, The Hartford, Desjardins, alongside The Institutes and Sure Inc., as well as others. 
 
For additional information on the HOMEE Claims platform, visit www.HOMEE.com.

Name: Maroc Assistance Internationale
Description:

Créée en 1976 et devenue l’une des filiales stratégiques du Groupe Banque Populaire en 1988, Maroc Assistance Internationale (M.A.I.) occupe une position de leader sur le marché de l’assistance au Maroc.

Pour consolider et développer cette position, M.A.I. s’inscrit dans une stratégie d’amélioration continue de la qualité de ses produits et services, à travers, notamment, une politique d’innovation constante. Son objectif premier est d’apporter à plus de 3 millions d’assurés résidant au Maroc et à l’étranger, une assistance humaine, médicale et technique, dans leur vie quotidienne et lors de leurs déplacements dans le monde entier.

Name: BVIX Seguradora
Description:
Na BVIX, acreditamos que crescer é mais do que alcançar resultados é construir caminhos sólidos, inspirar pessoas e transformar desafios em conquistas coletivas.
Com uma trajetória marcada pela inovação em produtos personalizados, transparência e foco nas pessoas, seguimos fortalecendo nossa presença no mercado de seguros com soluções inteligentes e parcerias que impulsionam o sucesso.
Cada conquista é fruto do comprometimento do nosso time, que atua com propósito e paixão em cada projeto. Acreditamos no poder da colaboração e da confiança como base para gerar valor sustentável a nossos clientes, corretores e parceiros.

Name: Salland Zorgverzekeraar
Description:
Salland Zorgverzekeraar verzekert duurzame, toegankelijke en betaalbare zorg voor iedereen in Nederland. Ook internationaal werkenden die tijdelijk in Nederland werken bieden we een passende zorgverzekering. Voor inwoners van gemeenten in de regio Salland met indicatie voor de Wet Langdurige zorg organiseren we de zorg die nodig is. 
We bestaan al ruim 160 jaar als zelfstandige zorgverzekeraar in Deventer, in de regio Salland. De Sallandse mentaliteit zit in ons DNA: Goede zorg regelen we gewoon, maar liever richten we ons op gezondheid. Onze zorg voor gezondheid is bedacht in de regio, maar niet beperkt tot een regio. We stimuleren en inspireren onze verzekerden om te werken aan hun gezondheid. Want voor een gezonde toekomst zorgen we samen. 
Onderdeel van Salland Zorgverzekeraar zijn Salland Zorgverzekeringen, HollandZorg en Salland Zorgkantoor.  

Werken bij Salland Zorgverzekeraar? 
Een overzicht van alle vacatures, verhalen van (misschien wel toekomstige) collega’s en een indruk van onze werkcultuur terug te vinden op werkenbijSalland.nl.

Name: Crabi

Name: Monarch National Insurance Company

Name: ضمانات | Damanat
Description:
الشركة السعودية لخدمات الضمان الإسكاني - ضمانات
انطلقت “ضمانات” في عام 2017 كمبادرة من برنامج الإسكان  في المملكة العربية السعودية، مواصلة جهودها في دعم مستهدفات البرنامج حتى أصبحت كيانًا مؤسسيًا مستقلاً يعمل على توفير المنتجات والحلول المبتكرة لخدمات الضمان الإسكاني. تكمن مهمة ضمانات الأساسية في تمكين المواطنين السعوديين من خلال توفير ضمانات الرهن العقاري المصممة خصيصًا لتوسيع شمولية الاستفادة من سوق الرهن العقاري والإسهام في تسهيل تملك المنازل. تعمل وفق منظومة الإسكان وتماشيًا مع هدف المملكة المتمثل في زيادة نسبة تملك المنازل بحلول عام 2030. كما تستهدف دعم قطاع التطوير العقاري في إنشاء مشاريع إسكانية جديدة، وتوفير خيارات رهن عقاري عادلة وشاملة للمستفيدين، ما يعزز الجهود المتضافرة لردم الفجوة بين العرض والطلب في القطاع العقاري الإسكاني، ويسهم في دعم الاستقرار المجتمعي.

Name: Criteria, Insurance Claims & Loss Adjusters S.L
Description:
Criteria supone la consolidación de un proyecto ambicioso, coherente y realista que, basándose en la experiencia, profesionalidad y calidad de servicio ofrecida durante casi tres décadas por –actualmente- más de 180 técnicos titulados ubicados en todo el territorio nacional, incluyendo islas, pretende:

- Agregar esfuerzos, conocimientos, formación y experiencia para poder ofrecer el mejor servicio técnico especializado en la peritación de daños, verificación, inspección en todos los ramos del seguro.

- Constituir una única estructura ágil y eficiente que garantice a sus clientes un servicio de alcance nacional de una forma sencilla y directa.

- Obtener de la suma de experiencias y capacidades, la más completa y flexible gama de servicios a disposición de sus clientes.

Nuestro valor diferencial es, sin duda, el equipo humano: técnicos titulados expertos, que cuentan con el apoyo y supervisión de una dirección técnica de primer nivel y se guían por los principios de honestidad, trabajo en equipo, valor de la formación, fiabilidad y preocupación por la innovación y el servicio al cliente.

El enfoque de la propuesta de servicios es la peritación de todo tipo de riesgos en el ámbito de la empresa: ramos técnicos, transporte, construcción, maquinaria, daños eléctricos, transporte, embarcaciones de recreo, pérdida de beneficios, RC profesional, RC Productos, riesgos cibernéticos,... incluyendo además las últimas herramientas de intervención digital para la peritación no presencial y para cualquier servicio al que aporten eficiencia y valor.

Name: EuroCaution
Description:
EuroCaution, underwriter, broker and Insurtech specialized in financial guarantees and performance bond for the real estate sector.

Founded in 2012 by the management team and the Edison Group, EuroCaution is an insurance and reinsurance broker specializing in the underwriting of financial guarantees, performance bond, credit insurance and various financial losses. We develop our own insurance products range for companies active in the construction and real estate development sector.
Products are distributed through a network of intermediaries composed of banks, insurance companies, real estate and insurance professionals.
Many factors distinguish us from our competitors:
A Luxembourg based underwriting team, specialized in the real estate and construction sector
A selection of the best insurers (with a rating of A and a solvency ratio greater than 250 %) allowing us to offer more than 250 Million € capacity to our customers
Best Price Policy
Administrative efficiency thanks to the digitization of our internal processes

EuroCaution has developed a range of products for the real estate sector. It offers “Garantie Financière d’achèvement” or “Garantie loi Breyne” for promoters and builders in the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg and in Belgium.

Through an insurance risk analysis approach, clients benefit from competitive conditions and benefits that complement those of the traditional banking system. As an InsurTech company, we have met the needs of our customers, that’s why the issuance of a financial guarantee is within 24 hours.
Eurocaution also specializes in, among others, payment guarantees, advance payment guarantee, performance bonds, guarantees of good execution, retention bonds and bid guarantees.
Bonds meet the needs of companies active in construction and real estate development.

Name: OONA Insurance
Description:
Founded in October 2022, Oona is focused on becoming the most customer driven provider of general insurance in Southeast Asia. Headquartered in Singapore, Oona is wholly owned by Oona Holdings Investments Pte. Ltd and backed 100% by Warburg Pincus, a leading global growth investor. 

Through a buy-and-build strategy, Oona aims to become the pre-eminent digitally-enabled general insurance provider in Southeast Asia. Oona currently has two licensed insurance entities, PT Asuransi Bina Dana Arta Tbk (“ABDA”)in Indonesia, and Oona Insular Insurance Corporation (“OIIC”) in the Philippines, both of which have a long-standing track record in their respective markets for delivering quality products and superior customer service. These assets bring Oona an initial product portfolio, strong distribution relationships, a robust infrastructure, and an immediate foothold in Southeast Asia upon which to build its business. These companies are now offering products and services as Oona Insurance since early 2023.

Oona plans to expand its presence across key Southeast Asia markets with the aim of being the number one choice for partners and customers alike, based on its customer service, technology and strong brand.

Name: Insurance Acquisition Partners
Description:
The US insurance market has seen a prolonged period of growth driven by supportive macroeconomic conditions and an increasingly complex set of risks that are actively managed by corporates, small to medium-sized businesses (SMBs), and individuals alike. Insurance brokers have been central in helping end-insureds navigate this evolving risk landscape — ranging from an increased rise of climate-linked catastrophic events to more sophisticated and frequent cybersecurity and data privacy incidents. 
IAP Insurance Acquisition Partners is focused on acquiring mid sized and large insurance firms across the United States and globally and finances insurance broker roll-ups and acquisitions. 
Our analysis suggests that a handful of insurance brokers — such as the Top 4 Global Insurance Brokers (Marsh, Aon plc, Willis Towers Watson and Arthur J Gallagher & Co.) and, highly acquisitive sponsor-backed insurance brokers (for example, Hub, USI, Acrisure) — have experienced significantly higher premium and revenue growth, while many others in the long-tail struggle to remain competitive without the same scale benefits.

By making investments via a Verve deferred variable annuity, policyholders can mitigate the erosion of their returns caused by tax-inefficiency and enhance investment yields.

An industry first, Verve’s entire shareholder base, leadership team, and external advisors consist entirely of individuals who are women, people of color, and/or identify as LGBTQ+.

Name: C&C Insurance service CZ, s.r.o.
Description:
C&C Insurance service je moderní, nezávislou a profesionální společností, která nabízí kvalitní servis, hodnoty a integritu svým klientům. Vyznačuje se individuálním přístupem a vždy hledá optimální řešení ve vztahu klient-riziko-pojišťovna. Firemní kultura, kvalifikovanost pracovníků, dlouholeté zkušenosti či vstřícnost ke specifickým požadavkům klientů, jakož i kvalitní zákaznický a poprodejní servis vedly k významnému nárůstu počtu klientů. Za krátký čas se společnost zařadila mezi přední slovenské společnosti v oblasti zprostředkování pojištění a v partnerských pojišťovnách také začala hrát klíčovou roli.

Podcenění pojištění by mohlo způsobit velké škody. Naopak správným přístupem k pojištění pomáháme optimalizovat náklady vynaložené na objektivně existující rizika. Proto je pojištění jako jeden z nástrojů řízení společnosti velmi potřebné a důležité. Společnost C&C Insurance service to velmi dobře ví a proto se snaží nabízet produkty a služby, které jsou účelné, hodnotné a hlavně vytvořené tak, aby přesně odpovídaly požadavkům klientů.

Historie společnosti

Společnost C&C Insurance service byla založena v roce 2003. Sídlo společnosti je v Bratislavě a prostřednictvím své pobočkové sítě působí po celém území Slovenské a prostřednictvím své dceřiné společnosti C&C Insurance service CZ působí po celém území České republiky. Společnost se zaměřuje na kvalitní a komplexní služby v oblasti pojištění pro firemní a individuální klienty a tím i na poskytování kvalitních finančních, asistenčních, informačních a jiných souvisejících služeb. Klientům nabízí zvláštní přístup, moderní a kvalitní služby, produkty šité na míru a nepřetržitou péči. Je jednou z nejvýznamnějších společností v oblasti zprostředkování neživotního pojištění s objemem již zprostředkovaného pojistného více než 250 000 000 EUR. Spolupracuje s nejvýznamnějšími pojišťovnami na Slovenském a Českém pojistném trhu. 

Nezávislé postavení společnosti umožňuje široký výběr kvalitního pojistného krytí.

Desde el seguro de responsabilidad civil general y seguro de compensación laboral, hasta seguros de responsabilidad profesional, errores y omisiones (E&O) y seguro de vehículos comerciales, ofrecemos opciones de cobertura robustas para que siempre estés protegido.

Name: Vertice Seguros C.A.
Description:
Tu tranquilidad es nuestra prioridad.
En Vértice Seguros, C.A., entendemos que el verdadero valor de un seguro no está solo en la póliza, sino en la certeza de saber que estás protegido en todo momento. Somos una empresa de seguros en Venezuela comprometida con el bienestar de las familias y empresas del país.

Operamos con total transparencia y legalidad, estando debidamente inscrita en la Superintendencia de la Actividad Aseguradora (SUDEASEG) bajo el número ES-124. Este respaldo institucional es la garantía de nuestra solidez y compromiso con las normas que protegen a nuestros asegurados.

Innovación y Tecnología al Servicio de tu Protección
No somos una aseguradora tradicional. Nos destacamos por ofrecer soluciones de seguro personalizadas, diseñadas para adaptarse a la realidad dinámica de cada cliente. Nuestro enfoque combina la agilidad tecnológica con una profunda vocación de servicio.

Queremos ser más que tu aseguradora; trabajamos para ser tu aliado estratégico. Ya seas un cliente individual, un intermediario o un aliado comercial, en nosotros encontrarás:

Respaldo y Solidez: Operaciones avaladas por la SUDEASEG (No. ES-124).
Eficiencia Digital: Procesos ágiles e innovadores que ahorran tiempo y eliminan burocracia innecesaria.
Atención Humana: Un equipo con vocación de servicio enfocado en la fidelización y la estabilidad de nuestros asegurados.

¿Por qué elegirnos?
Nuestra misión es clara: brindar soluciones eficientes que generen confianza. Nos diferenciamos por transformar la necesidad de seguridad en una experiencia de servicio superior.

"Tu tranquilidad es nuestra prioridad".

Más que un slogan, es la promesa que guía cada una de nuestras decisiones. Protege lo que más valoras con una empresa que combina la experiencia del sector asegurador con la innovación del futuro.

Name: Through Countries For Cars Services
Description:
نحنُ شركةٌ متخصصة في خدمة المركباتِ على الطرق من خلال إصدار كتاب المرور الجمركي (تربتيك) للتصدير والإستيراد المؤقت للسيارات عبر حدود المملكة الاردنية الهاشمية بالشراكة مع الاتحاد الدولي للسيارات. تأسست عام 2010.

وهي ليست شركة جديدة في هذا المجال. لأصحابها تاريخ طويل في كل ما يتعلق بخدمات نقل السيارات. مؤسسو الشركة من بين العلامات التجارية البارزة في هذا المجال.

في غضون عدة سنوات من إطلاقها ، أصبحت الشركة واحدة من الشركات الرائدة في المملكة الأردنية الهاشمية - وهو منصب احتفظت به الشركة لأكثر من 10 سنوات. من خلال العمل الجاد والدؤوب والشغف لهذا القطاع الحيوي والمؤثر ، نجحت الشركة في بناء شبكة قوية تتكون أساسًا من خبراء محليين وعالميين في مجال خدمة النقل بالسيارات والدراجات النارية والشاحنات وغيرها ، ممن لديهم فهم جيد وخبرة عالية في هذا المجال.

هدفنا إرضاء العميل ، وقيام الشركة بالارتقاء إلى مكانة عالية في هذا المجال ، والتواصل مع عملائنا من أجل زيادة الوعي العام بالخدمات التي نقدمها من أجل تسهيل متطلباتهم.

Name: INVICTUM CONSULTORES
Description:
¿Te has imaginado alguna vez siendo dueño de tu tiempo y de tu éxito, sin que nadie decida cuánto ganas o cuándo tomas vacaciones?

El mundo está cambiando. Cada vez más personas dejan atrás la rutina de la oficina y el horario fijo para convertirse en dueños de su vida profesional. Ser Agente de Seguros no es solo una profesión, es una carrera que te permite diseñar tu propio camino y crear un impacto real en la vida de las personas.

Algunas ventajas de la independencia son:

	•	Libertad de tiempo: Olvídate del reloj checador y la rutina de 9 de la mañana a 6 de la tarde, como Agente de seguros, organizas tu tiempo, priorizando lo que de verdad importa.
	•	Ingresos sin límite: Tu esfuerzo se traduce directamente en tu ingreso. No hay techos salariales ni esperas por aumentos.
	•	Crecimiento personal y profesional: Capacitación constante, desarrollo de habilidades de negociación, liderazgo y comunicación. 
	•	Reconocimiento y recompensas: No eres un número más. Cada logro es celebrado y premiado, con incentivos que van desde viajes hasta reconocimientos internacionales.
	•	Propósito: No vendes productos, proteges sueños. Cada póliza es una historia de seguridad y tranquilidad para las familias.

Sé que dejar la seguridad de un sueldo fijo da miedo, pero te pregunto: ¿Qué vale más, la comodidad de un salario limitado o la oportunidad de construir tu propio éxito, sin límites y con propósito?

Si estás buscando algo más que un trabajo, si quieres una carrera donde el éxito dependa de ti y no de una nómina, hablemos. En Invictum Consultores te acompañamos en cada paso para que logres la independencia que mereces.

Name: GUINEBIS SEGUROS S.A
Description:
A GUINEBIS S.A. é a primeira seguradora privada criada na Guiné-Bissau, desde 1997, com a missão de oferecer proteção, confiança e tranquilidade às pessoas, famílias e empresas.

Ao longo de mais de duas décadas, consolidámos a nossa posição como referência nacional no setor segurador, apostando na inovação, na proximidade ao cliente e na construção de soluções que respondem aos desafios da vida e da atividade empresarial.

Em 2009, firmámos uma parceria estratégica com o Banco da África Ocidental (BAO), permitindo disponibilizar os nossos produtos através da sua rede de agências em todo o país e reforçando o nosso compromisso de estar mais perto dos nossos clientes.

Somos também o Representante Oficial do Gabinete da Carte Brune – CEDEAO na Guiné-Bissau, o que nos posiciona como elo essencial no desenvolvimento da integração sub-regional e na mobilidade segura entre países.

O nosso lema, “Guiamos seguramente o futuro”, reflete a nossa visão: sermos um parceiro de confiança que acompanha cada cliente nos momentos mais importantes, garantindo apoio e soluções eficazes quando mais se precisa.

Na GUINEBIS, acreditamos que o seguro não é apenas uma obrigação, mas sim um instrumento de proteção, segurança e desenvolvimento sustentável. O nosso compromisso é continuar a crescer com o país, apoiando indivíduos, empresas e instituições, enquanto construímos um futuro mais seguro para todos.

Name: شركة أمانة للتأمين
Description:
موجب القرار رقم (05) برأس مال وقدرة (10.000.000 د.ل) عشرة ملايين دينار ليبي. ومنذ تأسيسها وضعنا في شركة أمانة نصب أعييننا رؤية تقوم على تقديم خدمات تأمينية رائدة تكون داعماً أساسياً للاقتصاد الوطني فأننا نؤمن في شركة أمانة بأهمية قطاع التامين في تحقيق الاستقرار فيها وهذا ما يجعلنا نسعى على الدوام في تطوير وتحديث خدمتنا التأمينية بما يواكب تطور الاقتصادي.

حيث نقوم بمختلف الخدمات التأمينية على سبيل المثال تأمين السيارات، وتأمين المسؤوليات وتأمين المسافرين، والتأمين البحري، والتأمينات الهندسية، وتأمينات الافراد وخدمة إعادة التأمين.

فقد إستطاعت الشركة خلال مدة وجيزة أن تحقق نتائج جيدة سواء كان ذلك من حيث إصدار الوثائق التأمينية او بما تحقق لها من عوائد مالية وكل ذلك يرجع الى ما تقدمه الشركة من مميزات وتغطيات ذات مستوى عالي لحماية اقتصاد الفرد والمجتمع والمساهمة في التطوير الاقتصادي والمالي والبشري بما يعود على إزدهار المجتمع والبلاد.

Name: Movicar Plataforma Inteligente
Description:
A Movicar nasceu em 2019 com o propósito de transformar a forma como pessoas e empresas gerenciam seus veículos e frotas, oferecendo tecnologia de ponta, segurança, atendimento próximo e humanizado.

Desde então, temos crescido de forma exponencial e saudável, sempre verificando o score dos associados, garantindo uma associação sólida, confiável e com grande relevância no mercado de proteção veicular.

Um dos nossos maiores orgulhos é que, em todos esses anos de atuação, a Movicar não possui nenhum processo judicial, demonstrando nosso compromisso com a transparência, ética e excelência nos serviços prestados.

Hoje, contamos com unidades estrategicamente localizadas para melhor atender nossos associados:

- 2 unidades em Sarzedo/MG
- 1 unidade em Ibirité/MG
- 1 unidade em Ribeirão das Neves/MG

- 1 unidade em Juiz de Fora/MG

Além de oferecer proteção veicular inteligente, a Movicar vem ampliando sua presença no cenário esportivo. Atualmente, estamos inseridos no meio do futebol, patrocinando grandes clubes como:

- América Mineiro FC
- Betim FC
- Itabirito FC
- Liga Nacional de Fut7

Entre outros times de destaque no cenário esportivo.

Nossa marca também está presente junto a grandes influenciadores da Região Metropolitana de Belo Horizonte, reforçando nossa relevância e reconhecimento no mercado.

Estamos em constante expansão, buscando inovação e parcerias estratégicas que agreguem valor aos nossos associados e parceiros.

Se você deseja conhecer mais sobre nossos serviços ou estabelecer uma parceria, entre em contato diretamente com nossa diretoria pelo telefone: (31) 99326-1652.

Name: СК «Княжа Лайф Вієнна Іншуранс Груп»
Description:
ПрАТ СК "Княжа Лайф Вієнна Іншуранс Груп" надає послуги зі страхування життя з 1999 року. Компанія має ліцензію Державної комісії з регулювання ринків фінансових послуг України: серія АВ № 499990 від 29.12.2007 р. (переоформлено 27.09.2016 р.). 

У нашій роботі ми спираємося на надійне плече австрійської фінансової групи Vienna Insurance Group, нашого акціонера, лідера страхового ринку Центральної і Східної Європи. Цей визнаний професіонал, знаний в усій Європі, слугує гарантом надійної та відкритої діяльності ПрАТ СК «КНЯЖА ЛАЙФ ВІЄННА ІНШУРАНС ГРУП». 

Керуючись 194-річним досвідом нашого головного акціонера, ми забезпечуємо високу якість послуг зі страхування життя та накопичення, реалізовуємо сподівання клієнтів, співробітників та акціонерів компанії шляхом етичного ведення бізнесу та стабільного розвитку. 

Стратегія розвитку ПрАТ СК «КНЯЖА ЛАЙФ ВІЄННА ІНШУРАНС ГРУП» побудована на основі європейських стандартів, високоякісному індивідуальному обслуговуванні клієнтів та виключно класичних принципах ведення бізнесу. 

У нашій діяльності ми керуємося кодексом професійної етики: 
1. Якісне та професійне обслуговування клієнтів, індивідуальний підхід; 
2. Розвиток та імплементація оптимальних програм для клієнтів; 
3. Активна участь у розвитку страхування в Україні. 

ПрАТ СК «КНЯЖА ЛАЙФ ВІЄННА ІНШУРАНС ГРУП» - № 1 в рейтингу надійності серед українських компаній зі страхування життя. За підсумками незалежного оцінювання найбільшого українського Рейтингового агентства «Експерт-Рейтинг» (від 19.04.2010 р.), за результатами 2009 року СК «КНЯЖА Life VIG» отримала найвищу оцінку фінансової надійності «А+» та стала № 1 серед компаній зі страхування життя України з найвищим підсумковим інтегральним показником. У 2012 році компанія стала Лідером Національної премії Insurance TOP та здобула перемогу в номінації «Вибір страхових посередників».

Description:
GETTING THE MOST OUT OF YOUR HEALTH INSURANCE PLAN
Obamacare (ACA) as a medical insurance provider. It offers advantages over private insurance, including comprehensive coverage with essential health benefits. Name: iM Life Insurance
Description:
It was founded in 1988 as Busan Life Insurance by investment from businessmen in Busan, and the name was changed to Hansung Life Insurance in 1993. In 1998, the branch system of the sales organization was implemented, and LG Group bought some of the shares and became an affiliate. It was acquired by LG Fire & Marine in 1999, and its name was changed to Lucky Life Insurance in 2000.

When LIG Group was separated in 2006, its name was changed to LIG Life Insurance. In 2008, it was jointly acquired by Woori Financial Group and Aviva of the UK, and the name was changed to Woori Aviva Life Insurance.

In 2014, as Woori Financial Group pursued privatization, it was sold to Nonghyup Financial Group as a package with Woori Investment & Securities. However, the financial authorities blocked the sale of variable insurance using the existing Nonghyup Life Insurance's local Nonghyup sales network, and it was judged that there was no synergy, so the sale was promoted.

In 2015, it was resold to DGB Financial Holdings and its name changed to DGB Life Insurance. In 2017, DGB Financial Group secured a 100% stake and was incorporated as a complete subsidiary.

On June 5, 2024, Daegu Bank changed its name to iM Bank and also changed its name to iM Life.

Name: شركة ليبيا للتأمين Libya insurance company
Description:
•     تأسست شركة ليبيا للتأمين بتاريخ 30 / 5 / 1964م وباشرت أعمالها فعليـاً فـي 1/ 1/ 1965م برأس مال قـدره (100,000) مائة ألف جنيه ليبي .
•     في عام 1971م آلت ملكيتها الكاملة للمجتمع ورُفع رأس مالها إلى (1,000,000) مليون دينار ليبي ثم رفُع عام 1981 م إلى  (2,000,000 ) مليونا دينار ليبي.
•     في عام 1989م رُفع رأس مال الشركة إلى  ( 30,000,000 ) ثلاثون مليون دينار ليبي لغرض زيادة قدرتها الاستيعابية  .
•     في عام 2000م ضُمت هيئة التأمين الطبي إلى  شركة ليبيا للتأمين ، وُرفــــــــــــع رأس مال الشـــــركة إلى  ( 50,000,000 )خمسون مليون دينار ليبي.
•     في عام 2007م تم خصخصة الشركة  ورُفع رأس مالها إلى(70,000,000) سبعون مليون دينار ليبي  مدفوع بالكامل لتكون بذلك وتظل أكبر شركة تأمين عاملة بالسوق الليبي .
•         في عام 2009م تم إفتتاح فرع التأمين التكافلي وفق الشريعة الإسلامية .

• Libya insurance company was established on May 30, 1964 and commenced operations on January 1, 1965 with a capital of (100,000) one hundred thousand Libyan dinars.

• In 1971, its full ownership devolved to the society, and its capital was raised to (1,000,000) million Libyan dinars, then in 1981 it was raised to (2,000,000) million Libyan dinars.

• In 1989, the company's capital was raised to (30,000,000) thirty million Libyan dinars for the purpose of increasing its underwriting capacity.

• In 2000, the medical insurance authority was joined to libya insurance company, and the company's capital was raised to (50,000,000) fifty million libyan dinars.

• The company was privatized in 2007 and its capital was raised to (70,000,000)seventy million libyan dinars. Fully paid. Its shares were offered in the libyan capital market for participation from the public and private sectors.

• In 2009, the takaful branch was opened in accordance with Islamic sharia

Name: FANAF 2024
Description:
La Fédération des Sociétés d'Assurances de Droit National Africaines organise la 48ème édition de son Assemblée Générale annuelle en Mauritanie. Elle se tiendra du 18 au 22 Février 2024 à Nouakchott sous le thème :« L’assurance au service du développement économique et social de l’Afrique.».
Les objectifs de l'Assemblée Générale:
-Rappeler les efforts de l’Afrique pour le développement optimal du secteur des assurances
-Inciter tous les pays africains à s’y intéresser davantage, car ce secteur est porteur de croissance
Poursuivre l'élargissement de la FANAF en termes de membres qui se situent à ce jour 
La Fédération des Sociétés d'Assurances de Droit National Africaines, en sigle FANAF, est une association professionnelle dont le grand défi est de favoriser la création de sociétés d'assurances purement locales avec des capitaux entièrement ou partiellement africains. Son siège social est à Dakar au Sénégal et elle compte en son sein 209 membres à ce jour.
L’Association a pour objectif de promouvoir le secteur de l’Assurance et de la Réassurance en Afrique afin d’en faire un secteur clé.

Description:
About Us

Welcome to Protect Insurance PCC Ltd ("Protect PCC"), a new Gibraltar Protected Cell Company (PCC) dedicated to fostering innovation and collaboration within the insurance industry. Our direct writing third-party PCC structure allows us to offer Cell owners flexible, secure, and efficient insurance services, tailored to meet the diverse needs of their customers in the UK ancillary insurance market.

Our Mission

At Protect PCC, our mission is to create an insurer that provides opportunities for new Cell owners to have control over the ancillary insurance products they provide to their customers. We have created a business where entrepreneurs and business owners can create a Cell where they will be able to innovate, create and participate in the success of their ancillary insurance products.

Our Vision

We envision a future where our Cells support the ancillary insurance market with innovative and customer-centric insurance products. Our goal is to empower these Cells to deliver exceptional value and service to their clients.

Core Values

• Treat Customers Fairly: We prioritize fairness and transparency in all our interactions, ensuring customers receive fair value insurance products with the best possible service.
• Excellence of Service: We strive for excellence in every aspect of our Cells business, from product development to customer support.
• Integrity: We conduct our business with the highest ethical standards, building trust and reliability with our Cells owners, clients and partners.
• Innovation: We embrace innovation, continuously seeking new ways to improve the products and services to meet the evolving needs of customers.
• Shared Values: We believe in the power of collaboration and shared values, working together to achieve common goals.

Connect with us to learn more about how we can help build the future for you and your customers with the creation of a Cell to produce innovative, fair value products which deliver good customer outcomes.

Farmers Union Mutual Insurance Company is a property and casualty company in Montana, writing business ONLY in Montana since 1915. FUMICO is the largest domiciled property and casualty insurance company in Montana.

Farmers Union Mutual Insurance Company, rated A – (excellent) by A. M. Best, is one of the largest writers of Farm and Ranch business in the state. Many of our investments are in the state of Montana which supports the local economy.

We have approximately 50 agents located across Montana in approximately 40 locations. Our company is a major sponsor of Montana High School Activities Association which promotes academics and sports. Agriculture is the mainstay of our state and we support the Montana Farmers Union in their efforts to promote the family farm and their way of life. Many of our agents are located in the rural communities of Montana and write business for the agricultural sector. Farmers Union Mutual Insurance Company is a major writer of Homeowners, Farm, Ranch and Auto in the state of Montana.

شركة المختار للتأمين هي شركة تأمين تكافلي ليبية (ش. م. ل)، تأسست برأسمال قدره عشرة ملايين ديناراً ليبياً بمدينة طرابلس، يوم 10/10/2007م، بموجب الإذن بتأسيسها وفق قرار رقم (265) لسنة 2007م، الصادر عن أمانة اللجنة الشعبية العامة للإقتصاد والتجارة والإستثمار.

إن شركة المختار للتأمين كانت ولا زالت إضافة نوعية في سوق التأمين الليبي نظراً لِما يتوفر لها من خبرات تتجاوز الأربعة عقود في مجال تقديم الخدمات التأمينية.

إن إتفاقيات إعادة التأمين التي تتمتع بها شركة المختار للتأمين - عن طريق نخبة من وسطاء إعادة التأمين المسجلين بسوق لندن (LIoyd's) - مع كبرى شركات إعادة التأمين الرائدة والمتميزة سواء على مستوى نوعية الخدمات أو على مستوى أنواع التغطيات التأمينية وكفاءتها، يجعلها ملبية لإحتياجات ومتطلبات حملة الوثائق( المشتركين ) بشروط وإشتراكات مناسبة تتلائم ودرجة الخطر، وهو ما سيؤهلها لتكون خدماتها منافسة ومتميزة وبتغطيات أشمل لتقوم بدور الإستشاري لزبائنها من حملة وثائقها لإعادة دراسة وتقييم وثائق التأمين وشروطها وإستثناءاتها من وقت لآخر لإدخال التعديلات المطلوبة على تلك الوثائق بما يلبي حاجة حملة الوثائق التأمينية

Name: Agence AXA Collective - Partage de la Valeur
Description:
Notre équipe est spécialisés en épargne salariale, retraite et actionnariat d’entreprises. 

Notre métier est la mise en place, le suivi et la gestion des placements dans les mécanismes de partage du profit (participation, intéressement), plans d’épargne d’entreprise, PEE, plan d’épargne retraite PER souscrit dans l’entreprise ou à titre individuel, actionnariat salarié ciblé ou collectif dans les entreprises cotées ou non cotées, en direct ou via FCPE. 

Au sein du groupe coexistent plusieurs entités :
-	AXA qui assure l’activité conseil et distribution
-	AXA gestion, notre société de gestion dédiée à l’épargne salariale et retraite
-      AXA assurances qui crée et distribue des solutions d’assurance retraite collective et individuelle

Nous intervenons directement auprès des grands groupes et ETI. Pour les TPE et PME, nous travaillons avec un réseau d’experts indépendants (Conseillers en Gestion de Patrimoine, Courtiers, Experts-comptables ...). 

Nous concevons des solutions adaptées au contexte de l'entreprise et menons les appels d'offres. Nous accompagnons les grands groupes et les ETI dans le déploiement des plans d'actionnariat à l'international. Nous formons les représentants du personnel, les directions des ressources humaines et les directions financières. Nous formons et accompagnons aussi les conseils habituels de l'entreprise et du dirigeant (conseillers financiers, conseillers en gestion de patrimoine, courtiers en assurance, experts-comptables...) qui accompagnent leurs clients PME et installent et suivent chez eux des solutions d'épargne salariale et retraite.

Name: 9-insurance
Description:
At 9-insurance, we are on a mission to provide affordable health insurance to underprivileged individuals and families in villages and small towns across India. Our innovative model of selling health insurance policies at just nine rupees makes them accessible to those who cannot afford regular health insurance policies.
Through our campaigns and events in association with non-profit organizations, we aim to reach out to the most vulnerable sections of society and provide them with the protection they need. Our policies cover a wide range of health risks and offer comprehensive coverage, ensuring our customers have access to quality healthcare services.
Our key activities include:
Creating awareness about the importance of health insurance.
Identifying and partnering with non-profit organizations to reach out to the target audience.
Developing and maintaining a robust online platform to manage insurance policies.
Providing prompt and efficient customer service.
Join us in our mission to make affordable health insurance accessible to all. Together, we can create a healthier and more equitable society.

Description:

Our mission is to protect and enhance private wealth through insurance-based structuring, leveraging the flexibility and efficiency of PPLI to support long-term estate, succession, and legacy planning.

We operate exclusively through a carefully selected network of licensed and experienced insurance brokers, wealth managers, and legal advisors. This model ensures every engagement meets the highest standards of professionalism, regulatory compliance, and personal service.

At Swiss Sure Group, we pride ourselves on:

Discretion: We understand the importance of confidentiality in private wealth matters.

Efficiency: Our lean structure allows us to act quickly and with purpose.

Tailored Service: Every solution is custom-built around the client’s jurisdiction, objectives, and legacy needs.

Rooted in Swiss values and supported by an international platform, Swiss Sure Group combines the best of both worlds — precision, trust, and global adaptability — to serve the evolving needs of our clients and partners.

Name: PETRISK a.s.
Description:
PETRISK je česká nezávislá pojišťovací makléřská společnost s 30-ti letou tradicí, která poskytuje převážně služby v oblasti průmyslového pojištění, risk managementu a financí. Jsme zkušený a spolehlivý partner s mezinárodním know-how, ale především velmi osobním přístupem ke klientovi. 

Spoluprací s našimi specialisty získáte nejvýhodnější nabídky pojištění a záruku plné informovanosti o vývoji cen a nejlepších podmínkách využití pojistných produktů. 

Jsme připraveni Vám pomoci s veškerými druhy pojištění a zároveň i s ohodnocením rizik, která mohou ohrožovat Vaše podnikání.

Díky našim specialistům a skrze naše obchodní partnery, z řad mezinárodních pojišťovacích a zajišťovacích makléřů a jejich celosvětových sítí, jsme schopni Vám pojistit prakticky všechna rizika po celém světě. Spolupracujeme se zkušenými odborníky s dlouholetou praxí v oblasti pojišťovacích služeb na zahraničních trzích a v oblasti správy mezinárodních pojistných programů, kdy i nepojistitelná rizika na českém pojistném trhu jsme schopni pro Vás ve velmi krátké době zajistit.

V roce 2019 jsme stáli u zrodu sdružení skupiny makléřů s názvem STAR INSURANCE GROUP, s.r.o., která sdílí stejné hodnoty, společné administrativní zázemí v podobě sdílení podkladů pro kontrolní orgán ČNB, společný software na srovnání pojištění a software na administrativní agendu. S předepsaným pojistným více jak 3 mld. Kč patří skupina STAR do TOP5 největších pojišťovacích skupin v ČR.

V roce 2023 společnost PETRISK a.s. získala velmi prestižní ocenění, a to 1. místo vanketě „Pojišťovací makléř roku 2022“, v loňském roce pak ocenění „Pojišťovací makléř roku 2023 – TOP 5“, které jsme obhájili i letos oceněním „Pojišťovací makléř roku 2024 – TOP 5“.

Name: Eurasia Insurance Company
Description:
Eurasia Insurance Company JSC (Eurasia) is the largest and leading insurance and reinsurance company in Central Asia, located in Kazakhstan. Eurasia was established as a joint stock company in Almaty, Kazakhstan in 1995.

Eurasia’s business can be split into 3 major services:
• Direct insurance from the domestic market
• Facultative reinsurance from local insurance companies
• Reinsurance/retrocession on facultative and treaty basis from foreign insurance and reinsurance companies

Eurasia has gained the respect of many international insurers and reinsurers for its reliability, financial security and underwriting proficiency, and presently provides its reinsurance support in more than 130 countries worldwide. The company is assigned a financial strength rating by A.M. Best of “B++” with stable outlook, and “BBB” with stable outlook by Standard & Poor’s.

Our financial stability has proved acceptable to “A” rated companies all over the world allowing us to provide reinsurance support for these companies on a facultative and treaty basis. 

Eurasia has the ability to insure and reinsure all classes of business insurance on proportional and non-proportional basis, including Property Damage/ Business Interruption (PD/BI); Contractors’ All Risks/Erection All Risks/Machinery Breakdown (CAR/EAR/MB); Marine (H&M/Cargo/P&I); Transportation (Sea/Air/Land); Energy/Oil/Mining; Terrorism/SRCC. 

International membership:
• IUA – International Underwriting Association of London
• IUMI – International Union of Marine Insurance - Switzerland
• FAIR – Federation of Afro-Asian Insurers and Reinsurers
• AFK – Association of Financiers of Kazakhstan

We primarily focus on serving public interests and on personal success of our clients, partners and employees.

For more information about Eurasia Insurance Company, please visit www.theeurasia.kz

A lot has changed over the past 76 years, but one thing has remained the same: our commitment to our clients.

At Kattan-Ferretti, each agent specializes in one area of insurance. We believe you deserve the same focused dedication provided by any other profession. We take a comprehensive review of your life, your business, your home, and your family. We do much more than sell insurance policies. We invest in protecting your future.

Keeping you protected is just as important as saving you money. We really want to know what’s important in your life, and we’ll help you develop a plan to protect it.

Description:
تعتبر شركة صحتك تهمنا للخدمات الطبيه والتى تحمل شهادة تأسيس من رئيس هيئة الأستثمار رقم 274 ك بتاريخ 2/2/2023 هي الأولي من نوعها التى تقوم بتوفير أول وأقوي بديل مجاني وإلكترونى للتأمين الصحي في مصر والذي يشمل خصومات مجانية علي كافة الخدمات الطبية المتاحة بدون أي اشتراكات او رسوم ادارية  وتوفر صحتك تهمنا أكبر منصة مجانية شاملة تجمع بين مختلف أنواع المؤسسات الطبيه ( المستشفيات – العيادات – المراكز الطبية التخصصية – الصيدليات – مراكز الأشعة – مراكز التحاليل – مراكز البصريات والمستلزمات الطبيه ) وذلك لتحقيق رسالتها وهى الأرتقاء بمنظومة الرعاية الصحية في مصر دون تحميل أي أعباء إضافية علي المرضي.

ويمكن للمؤسسات الطبية بمختلف انواعها أن توفر تجربة رعاية صحية سهلة وبدون عقبات بفضل برنامج ادارة المؤسسات الطبية من صحتك تهمنا.
تعمل صحتك تهمنا حالياً بمدينة الأسكندرية وقريبا في باقي محافظات مصر. نطمح لتقديم تأمين صحي مجاني لكل عائلة في مصر.

Name: Lincoln County Farmers Mutual Insurance
Description:
OUR MUTUAL IS “SMALL ENOUGH TO KNOW YOU BUT STRONG ENOUGH TO SERVE YOU.”
The mutual insurance companies have been serving Missouri property owners since the Civil War.  Lincoln County Farmers Mutual has been serving the Lincoln & Pike Counties since November 1900.  Through the years we have reached out to surrounding counties throughout the State of Missouri.  This growth has allowed us to maintain a strong resilience to Mother Nature & Murphy’s Law.  
The Missouri Mutuals are owned by their policyholders.  The Board of Directors is composed of policyholders alike.  We treat our policyholders as we want to be treated, with respect, dignity, and privacy. 
You can depend on us to protect your home, personal property, livestock and more! Call us for a free quote or just stop by our office; we would love to meet you!

Name: Insurance Advisor
Description:

They assist clients in choosing the right insurance coverage, whether it's life, health, property, or business insurance. Advisors also provide valuable insights into policy terms, coverage options, and premium costs.  They are also there to support clients during the claims process, ensuring a smooth experience during challenging times.

Name: MAFRA | Logística y Seguros
Description:
En MAFRA Seguros y Logística S.A. nos especializamos en proteger y movilizar tus envíos internacionales con un enfoque integral que combina seguridad, eficiencia y confianza.

Nuestro primer pilar es la aseguradora, ofreciendo el seguro de transporte más accesible y confiable del mercado, diseñado para brindar tranquilidad y respaldo ante cualquier imprevisto durante el traslado de mercancías.

El segundo pilar es nuestro servicio Break Bulk, con tres salidas semanales desde Asia hacia Costa Rica, garantizando control total, cumplimiento y eficiencia en cada embarque.

El tercer pilar es nuestra logística internacional, que cubre servicios marítimos y aéreos desde Asia o cualquier parte del mundo hacia Costa Rica, optimizando rutas, tiempos y costos.

Gracias a nuestras alianzas estratégicas de nivel mundial, ofrecemos contenedores garantizados (on hand), excelentes tarifas y atención directa en origen, asegurando el éxito de cada operación.

En MAFRA, nuestro compromiso es tu tranquilidad y el crecimiento de tus operaciones, combinando experiencia, atención personalizada y respaldo global para que cada carga llegue segura, en tiempo y forma.

MAFRA LATAM — Expertos en seguros de transporte, Break Bulk y soluciones logísticas globales a tu medida.

Name: Allianz Genocchi Assicurazioni G.A.Consulting
Description:
Proteggere ciò che conta davvero non è una scelta, è una responsabilità. 

Allianz, Genocchi Assicurazioni, è il partner che da anni rappresenta un punto di riferimento nel territorio offrendo consulenza assicurativa su misura per privati, professionisti e aziende. Progettiamo soluzioni personalizzate per la tutela di persone, attività e patrimoni, ascoltando le reali esigenze di chi si affida a noi. 

 Non ci occupiamo solo di assicurazioni, proteggiamo case, famiglie, aziende e patrimoni sapendo che dietro di ogni scelta c'è qualcosa di prezioso: il futuro dei figli, il lavoro di una vita, un progetto nato dal coraggio di mettersi in gioco. 

Costruiamo strategie assicurative su misura che non si limitano a coprire rischi, ma aiutano a proteggere ciò che conta davvero. Dalla serenità della famiglia alla solidità dell'azienda che un cliente ha costruito con sacrificio e passione, accompagniamo ogni decisione con professionalità, rispetto e cura. 

Perché dietro ogni contratto c'è una storia, e noi vogliamo esserne parte, offrendo sicurezza oggi e costruendo insieme il domani.

Name: Società Svizzera d'Assicurazione contro la Grandine Società Cooperativa
Description:
Società Svizzera d'Assicurazione contro la Grandine, società cooperativa o Assicurazione Grandine Svizzera è una solida realtà specializzata nella gestione del rischio grandine e avversità atmosferiche. La nostra lunghissima tradizione, la solidità e l'esperienza maturate nel soddisfare le esigenze di copertura dei rischi climatici degli agricoltori, ci hanno fatto conquistare la leadership del settore in Svizzera e ci hanno reso partner affidabili di primarie Compagnie in Europa.

Operiamo nel mercato italiano dal 2005 e la profonda conoscenza del mondo imprenditoriale agricolo ci ha portato a progettare prodotti innovativi, tarati sugli attuali processi agronomici.

Il nostro obiettivo è quello di fornire polizze assicurative semplici che aiutino a capire le scelte e le implicazioni liquidative sottese. Ci impegniamo a predisporre tutti gli elementi utili al nostro cliente per comparare le nostre offerte assicurative rispetto a quelle del mercato.

Chi sceglie Assicurazione Grandine Svizzera ha la tranquillità di contare su un'esperienza centenaria e soprattutto ha la certezza di trovare assistenza completa ed efficace.

Name: AGVN PROTEÇÃO PATRIMONIAL MUTUALISTA
Description:
AGVN Proteção Patrimonial Mutualista é uma associação que nasceu com um propósito claro: proteger o seu veículo com responsabilidade, transparência e cuidado personalizado. Atuamos com soluções completas para carros, motos, utilitários e caminhões, oferecendo suporte em todo o Brasil através de uma rede de atendimento ágil e eficiente.

Mais do que proteção, oferecemos tranquilidade. Nosso time está preparado para atender com empatia e rapidez, em situações de roubo, furto, colisão, assistência 24h, e muito mais.

Trabalhamos com tecnologia e atendimento humanizado para garantir a melhor experiência aos nossos associados — e com um modelo de proteção sem burocracia e com preços acessíveis.

O que nos move:
 Cuidar do seu bem mais precioso: sua segurança e mobilidade
 Criar relacionamentos de confiança com associados e parceiros
 Crescer com responsabilidade e ética no setor de proteção patrimonial mutualista

O que oferecemos:
 Planos de proteção patrimonial mutualista sob medida
 Assistência 24h em todo o território nacional
 Suporte em casos de furto, roubo, colisão e eventos da natureza
 Equipe comercial dedicada e suporte especializado
 Parcerias com oficinas e prestadores de serviço

Estamos em busca de:
• Novos associados que queiram se proteger de forma inteligente
• Oficinas, guinchos e prestadores que desejam fazer parte da nossa rede
• Profissionais comerciais que querem crescer junto com a AGVN

Junte-se a nós!
Na AGVN, proteção vai além do veículo — é sobre cuidar de pessoas.

Description:
Concord Insurance Company Limited (“Concord”) is one of the longest established general insurance companies authorized by the Insurance Authority in Hong Kong. Name: Cuneo Centro Assicurazioni
Description:
Cuneo Centro Assicurazioni è un punto di riferimento per privati, aziende e professionisti alla ricerca di soluzioni assicurative affidabili e su misura. Offriamo protezione a 360°, garantendo sicurezza, consulenza specializzata e massima trasparenza nella scelta delle polizze più adatte alle esigenze dei nostri clienti.

Grazie alla nostra esperienza pluriennale e alla collaborazione con i migliori partner del settore, forniamo coperture personalizzate per auto, casa, salute, impresa e tutela legale.

 Assicurazioni per privati
Mettiamo al primo posto la tua sicurezza e quella della tua famiglia, con polizze auto e moto, assicurazioni sulla casa, soluzioni per il risparmio, la previdenza complementare e la protezione della salute.

Questa pagina è stata creata per tenervi sempre informati sulle attività ed iniziative dell'Agenzia Generali Rimini Italia. Cercheremo di rispondere a tutte le Vostre domande, tutta via questa pagina non è dedicata al servizio clienti. La Vostra opinione per noi è importante e ogni Vostro commento e suggerimento è ben accetto.
Risponderemo ai Vostri commenti dal Lunedì al Venerdì, dalle 9 alle 18.
La Netiquette, o galateo di comportamento in rete, è quell'insieme di regole alla base della partecipazione a progetti digitali come community, forum, chat, social media e user generate content.
Vi chiediamo di rispettare le comuni regole di buona educazione: ci riserviamo di cancellare tutti i contenuti un linguaggio volgare, promuovano attività illegali, violino il diritto di autore o siano palesemente fuori argomento.
Per informazioni sulla tua situazione contrattuale puoi collegarti all'Area Clienti. Per reclami o segnalazioni di disservizi riguardanti il rapporto contrattuale o la gestione dei sinistri ti puoi rivolgere all'ufficio Tutela Cliente.

Relaciones Personales

Excelencia

Name: Professional Transportation Risk Retention Group, Inc.
Description:
Professional Transportation Risk Retention Group, Inc. (PTRRG) provides commercial auto liability insurance to commercial transportation carriers with a special emphasis on small fleet operations, owner-operator risks, and newer ventures. PTRRG operates on the principals of consultative risk management, vigorous claims defense, financial strength and premium stability. As a Risk Retention Group, our company is owned by our policyholders, and our goal is to provide affordable stable premiums, not profits for third-party shareholders. PTRRG is owned and directed by transportation operators that are committed to defending and rewarding Safe Driving and Professional Transportation. 

PTRRG is managed by a team of liability insurance specialists with expertise in underwriting, risk management and claim defense. Our team has years of industry experience offering customized insurance solutions to Transportation Operators.  

Professional Transportation Risk Retention Group, Inc. is a corporation domiciled in Alabama.

Name: 三井住友海上集團明台產物保險股份有限公司
Description:
明台保險於1961年3月25日經財政部核准設立，之後於2005年7月成為日本三井住友保險集團台灣子公司，除致力於深耕台灣本土市場，更配合產業國際化腳步以及三井住友海上集團的經營策略，將多樣化的保險商品與綿密的服務觸角延伸至全球各地，提供國際化的保險服務予全球華人。

明台原本即以穩健的財務實力立足台灣產險界，自2005年加入三井住友海上集團後，整體財務實力更為雄厚，資本適足率RBC遠高於法令規定，更連續15年獲得中華信評twAAA最高等級評等，亦為疫後唯一一家獲肯定的產險公司，同時也具有集團再保資源與優於業界的承保容量，深具可靠的財務實力及長期穩定的經營績效。

為講求高效率之服務，全國各地設有16個分公司、25個異地辦公處所、通訊處及服務中心，員工總人數約為1300人，以成為台灣地區最貼心的國際產物保險公司為願景，以創新方式創造利害關係人的最大利益，實現企業社會責任。

Name: УСК «Княжа Вієнна Іншуранс Груп»
Description:
Страхова компанія «Княжа Вієнна Іншуранс Груп» – це надійна страхова компанія загальнонаціонального масштабу, яка постійно розвивається та працює на страховому ринку України з 1997 року, а з 2005 року – входить до складу потужної європейської фінансової структури Vienna Insurance Group.

Страхова компанія «Княжа VIG» є одним із лідерів класичного страхування на українському ринку. Компанія має унікальний досвід професійної діяльності в галузі страхування, що дозволяє пропонувати індивідуальні страхові рішення та забезпечувати якісний сервіс по всій Україні. Це можливо завдяки потужній регіональній мережі та професійній команді, до складу якої входить 25 дирекцій, більше 200 регіональних центрів, понад 700 співробітників і 665 агентів.

Компанія діє на підставі 33 ліцензій на впровадження обов'язкових та добровільних видів страхування. Кожен власник поліса СК «Княжа VIG» отримує дієвий страховий захист і грошову підтримку, що допомагає долати фінансові труднощі та зберігати гідний рівень життя під час прикрих ситуацій.

За 25 років своєї діяльності компанія здобула бездоганну репутацію та завоювала довіру понад мільйона клієнтів, бо щодня максимізує рівень їх задоволеності, гарантує високу фінансову надійність та сумлінно виконує свої зобов'язання. Тільки за 6 місяців 2022 року СК «Княжа VIG» зібрала понад 517 000 000 грн страхових платежів та виплатила 177 000 000 грн своїм клієнтам.

Гарантом якості та фінансової стабільності СК «Княжа VIG» є Vienna Insurance Group, яка успішно працює на європейському страховому ринку з 1824 року. На сьогодні Vienna Insurance Group активно представлена в 30 країнах і є провідною страховою групою в Австрії, Центральній та Східній Європі, має бездоганну репутацію на страховому ринку. Більше 25 000 співробітників в 50 компаніях Групи щодня забезпечують страховий захист своїх клієнтів.

Name: Certified Marine Insurance Professional (CMIP)
Description:
Welcome to the International Institute of Marine Insurance Studies (IIMIS), the home of the Certified Marine Insurance Professional Designation Program (CMIP).

CMIP is the premier practical training and Designation Program in Marine and Longshore Insurance. Presented by the International Institute for Marine Insurance Studies in conjunction with LIG Educational & Consulting Services.

Designed for: Agents, Brokers, CSRs, Insurance Company Personnel
or anyone who wants to expand their knowledge of Business Marine Insurance.

To obtain your CMIP designation, you must attend each of the four CMIP Seminars and successfully pass a short exam at the end of each.
Four Seminar Topics include:
 - Insuring Vessel Owners & Operators
 - Insuring Waterfront Businesses
 - Insuring Marine Employees
 - Recreational Marine Insurance

Learn more or register for the next seminar at iimis.com.

Зараз у нас застраховано понад 100 тис українців.
Ми є членом Національної Асоціації Страховиків України.

Маємо близько 100 продуктів накопичувального та ризикового страхування, що можуть задовольнити будь-які потреби у фінансовому захисті життя та здоров’я.
Корпоративним клієнтам ми створимо індивідуальну страхову програму, яка враховує особливості колективу та цілі менеджменту. Це надає 100% захист від непередбачуваних подій, що пов’язані з життям та здоров’ям працівників.
Ми відкриті для всіх форм партнерського співробітництва від надання додаткового сервісу для ваших клієнтів до розробки спільних продуктів. Наші переваги - вигідні умови співпраці, індивідуальний підхід, відсутність складних бюрократичних процедур та швидке прийняття рішень.

Обирайте свій LIFE разом з нами!

Inoltre, nel caso di acquisto di un’auto usata da privati, la garanzia prevista dal Codice del Consumo non si applica, aumentando ulteriormente il rischio di spese inattese.

Name: Gunns Restoration - Renewal Claim Solutions
Description:
Welcome to Gunns Restoration - your trusted partner for restoration services following a disaster. We know that as an insurance adjuster or claims representative, you're committed to finding efficient and successful solutions for your clients. That's where we come in - our team is equipped and prepared to assist you with the restoration process.

Gunns Restoration, in partnership with Renewal Claim Solutions, specializes in providing expert restoration services for textiles, linens, and electronics following a disaster. Our team of skilled professionals has over 100 years of combined industry experience dedicated to restoring damaged items to their pre-loss condition.

Our state-of-the-art technology provides high-quality solutions, and our Proprietary Ten-Step Process creates a particular focus on issue management to follow each issue to completion. It offers structure and assurance that the claim will be supported and the insured indemnified. Every claim is unique, and so are our customized solutions, tailored to each client's specific needs.

Experiencing a disaster is stressful. We work closely with insurance adjusters to ensure that every claim is resolved efficiently and expertly.

If you're an insurance adjuster or claims representative looking for a trusted partner for restoration services, Gunns Restoration is here to provide a seamless solution. Expert help is just a phone call away. Let Gunns Restoration help you and your client find the best solution for your needs.

Name: Taiwan Transport Insurance Services Ltd
Description:
Provider For Comprehensive Transport Claims Services 
Given the importance of Taiwan's shipping market in the world, our company, formerly known as Thomas Miller Taiwan, was established in 1998 in Taipei as a subsidiary of the long-established British professional mutual insurance management company, Thomas Miller & Co. Ltd. We provide liability insurance claim services to ship owners, non-vessel operating common carriers (NVOCCs), container yards, as well as the agents in Taiwan, aiming to offer expertise insurance claim services to the vast shipping industry. In the time-sensitive ocean and air transportation sectors, we provide localized global services 和 communicate with international insurers such as UK P&I Club, TT Club, ITIC Club, UK Defence Club, Ship Owner's P&I Club to protect the interests of our members.
Key members with more than +25 Years of experience
The company's core team includes Managing Director, Adelaide Yang, who has over 30 years of insurance claim experience. Claims Manager, Laurel Hung has many years of claims experience with shipping companies, assisting P&I in dealing with numerous maritime disputes, skilled in communication. Claims Manager, Jean Hsu holds a LLM degree from Indiana University, USA, has long been involved in maritime 和 insurance cases. She is familiar with maritime lawyers domestically & internationally, protecting members' interests in litigation. Both managers have over 25 years of P&I experience.
Honor from the Authority
Since 2022, our company was assigned by the Maritime & Port Bureau in Taiwan as the consultant for P&I policy review. In order to minimize the risks of casualties, the Maritime & Port Bureau in Taiwan decided to carry out the P&I policies review for all of the vessels calling at Taiwanese ports. Our company was honored to participate in the risk management plan held by the Authority.

𝐍𝐨 𝐥𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐬. 𝐍𝐨 𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐩𝐚𝐲𝐢𝐧𝐠. Coverage is activated 𝐨𝐧𝐥𝐲 𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐢𝐭’𝐬 𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐝𝐞𝐝.

Name: ClaimsCraft LLC
Description:
In the ever-evolving landscape of property insurance, carriers continually seek innovative strategies to enhance operational efficiency, reduce costs, and elevate customer satisfaction. One of the most significant challenges facing the industry today, especially in hail-prone regions, is the management of property claims - a process often fraught with lengthy timelines, escalating costs, and varying degrees of customer dissatisfaction. The traditional model, reliant on third-party contractors for repairs, introduces complexities such as inflated costs, inconsistent quality of work, and a lack of direct control over the claims resolution process.
In response to these challenges, I propose a groundbreaking approach: a Managed Repair Program called ClaimsCraft, designed specifically for the insurance industry. This strategic initiative envisions insurance carriers being able to offer in-house repair services, while having true cost control of materials and labor while eliminating the typical contractors’ profit margins. This model not only promises a more streamlined and cost-effective claims resolution process but also enhances the customer experience by offering in-house repair teams to fix storm-damaged homes efficiently and effectively, resulting in happier policy holders and increases in market share.

Company Overview:

At My Premier Plans, we are dedicated to transforming the healthcare experience by offering innovative direct primary care membership plans. Our mission is to make healthcare more accessible, affordable, and personalized for individuals, families, and businesses.

Why Choose My Premier Plans?

Accessible Care: We provide direct access to primary care services without the hassle of insurance barriers. Our members enjoy unlimited visits, extended appointment times, and direct communication with their healthcare providers.

Affordable Solutions: By eliminating the middleman, we reduce healthcare costs significantly. Our membership plans offer a cost-effective alternative to traditional insurance, ensuring you get the care you need without breaking the bank.

Personalized Service: Our members receive personalized attention and care tailored to their specific needs. Our dedicated team of healthcare professionals is committed to your health and wellness.

What We Offer:

Unlimited Primary Care Visits: No copays, no deductibles—just quality care when you need it.
Extended Appointment Times: We take the time to understand your health concerns and provide comprehensive care.
Direct Communication: Stay in touch with your healthcare provider through phone, email, or text.
Preventive Care: Focus on preventive measures to maintain your health and well-being.
Transparent Pricing: Clear, upfront pricing with no hidden fees.
Who We Serve:

Individuals and Families: Personalized care plans to meet the health needs of you and your loved ones.
Businesses: Affordable healthcare solutions to keep your employees healthy and productive.
Healthcare Providers: Partner with us to deliver top-notch care to a growing member base.
Our Vision:

We envision a future where healthcare is patient-centered, easy to access, and devoid of unnecessary complexities.

Với việc áp dụng công nghệ hiện đại và chuyên môn y tế, nền tảng mạnh mẽ của Bowtie cung cấp các gói bảo hiểm y tế theo Chương trình Bảo hiểm Y tế Tự Nguyện (VHIS) và các sản phẩm bảo hiểm khác trực tiếp đến khách hàng một cách nhanh chóng. Từ đó, Bowtie loại bỏ giấy tờ, hoa hồng và trung gian để cho phép thế hệ mới của người tiêu dùng tiếp cận bảo vệ bảo hiểm thực sự và tự quyết định về quyết định bảo vệ cuộc sống cho chính họ. Điều này thể hiện rõ sứ mệnh của Bowtie trong việc mang đến sự tiện lợi và dễ dàng cho khách hàng trong việc quản lý bảo hiểm. Bên cạnh đó, Bowtie được hỗ trợ với hơn 400 triệu HKD từ Mitsui & Co., Ltd, Sun Life Hong Kong Limited và các nhà đầu tư quốc tế hàng đầu khác, cho thấy sự đánh giá cao và lòng tin của các nhà đầu tư về tiềm năng của Bowtie trên thị trường bảo hiểm.
